falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above its 200-day moving average by at least 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's implied bearish continuation, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average true range (ATR) increases by 50% compared to the 2024 August bottom pattern's ATR
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained volatility above historical thresholds would refute the pattern's stability assumptions, disproving the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX drops below 15 for three consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extremely low volatility would contradict the blowoff score's implied market stress, falsifying the current risk assessment.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
